policy.read_first: Read this state file before archive logs.
policy.archive_rule: Do not read docs/ops/self-improvement/archive by default; use only for explicit audits.
policy.feature_work_priority: Keep self-improvement in dedicated chore branches and do not mix with feature PRs.

resolved_candidates.resolution: Added CodeRabbit actionable state derived from check bucket plus unresolved review threads.
Created trigger-based self-improvement loop with lightweight state-first reading and archive avoidance.
Added a PR watcher script so CodeRabbit and CI polling can run in one long-lived command with notification instead of manual loop calls.
Clarified that external document paths are not MMP canonical instructions unless matching files exist in the repository.
Documented that operational-only PRs do not require forced full CI when workflow path filters intentionally skip them; CodeRabbit, light checks, and focused local checks are the merge gate.
Documented that watcher exit codes must trigger the next Codex action instead of only stopping and reporting.
Added validation that resolved_candidates ids exist in candidates.jsonl.
Added gh retry handling and transient failure continuation for long-running PR watcher polling.
Tracked workflow names already dispatched by the watcher so missing workflow dispatch happens at most once per session.
Added a CI steward handoff workflow so PR review, Codecov, and CI hardening can run on a single PR branch while main Codex continues next-issue work in a separate worktree.
Documented that completed sub-agents must be closed after final result collection, and that slot-limit failures should first close completed agents.

Documented that when main Codex adds a commit to a steward-managed PR, repeated CodeRabbit/check waiting must be re-handed to the steward while main keeps only one-shot status checks and final merge judgment.

Added deterministic CI scope classification so code-rabbit-only PRs do not receive ready-for-ci labels, workflow dispatches, or heavy-CI wait loops, while full-ci PRs still require Codecov and required checks.

Made long-running mmp-pr-watch use CI-steward-only by default and updated PR lifecycle guidance so main Codex uses one-shot status checks plus steward handoff instead of direct background watcher loops.

Required steward final reports to pass mmp-pr-status --fail-on-blocker on the latest head, added unresolved review thread details, and clarified that verified target-PR thread resolution is an allowed autonomous steward action.
Clarified that pending CodeRabbit/CI is not a final steward state, required status replies with phase/head/next action, and made timeout/no-progress states report BLOCKED with evidence.

Changed strict-behind handling from automatic steward branch update to merge-batch decision ownership by main Codex, preserving current-head CI evidence unless the PR is the next merge target, conflicts, main drift, or user direction requires refresh.

Moved Codecov risk left by requiring a Coverage Plan in issues/working notes and PR bodies before PR creation, with changed files and branches mapped to focused tests so 70% patch coverage gaps are not first discovered at merge time.

Required minimized, excluded, or deferred implementation scope to be tracked in the current issue, an issue checklist/comment, or a new follow-up GitHub Issue before PR merge, with PR Refs links for intentional leftovers.
Documented CI-cost-aware PR grouping so related workflow/config/docs changes can be handled in one PR while high-risk runtime or contract changes still split for reviewability.
Made mmp-pr-status parse Codecov patch coverage and fail --fail-on-blocker when patch coverage is below 70%, so steward final checks cannot miss the real coverage blocker.

Added the user-approved MMP headquarter/orchestrator workflow so main Codex owns task ledgers and decisions while implementation, review, validation, PR stewardship, and wrap-up are delegated to specialized subagents.
Documented that cmux browser QA must use the cmux-browse surface first, with Playwright/in-app browser fallback only when cmux control is unavailable and the fallback reason is reported.
Required plans, task instructions, subagent handoffs, and execution ledgers to use Markdown todo checkboxes and mark verified completed items during progress updates.

Added a default request-to-PR workflow harness that connects preflight, diagnosis, interview/seed, scoped implementation, validation evidence, review, PR, and merge while keeping long procedure details in a skill.
Documented OOO run stop conditions and salvage behavior so over-broad execution is cancelled instead of being applied silently.
Added a reusable browser evidence format for cmux/browser QA reports.

last_review.summary: Added MMP workflow harness v1, preflight status script, OOO run scope guard, and browser QA evidence format.
